profileSection.title: Aurélio Ribeiro
profileSection.subtitle: Software Engineer
profileSection.description: Full Stack Developer enthusiast in artificial intelligence.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: These are some of my projects that were part of my learning journey: some more recent, others older, but all built with dedication and a strong desire to learn.

about-me.title: About me
about-me.description: I am a software engineer driven by curiosity, consistency, and the desire to build useful solutions. I come from Jussara, a small town in Bahia, and I carry the discipline of someone who learned to create opportunities through effort. I enjoy turning real problems into simple, thoughtful products with positive impact. When I do not have all the answers, I study, test new paths, and keep evolving.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Let's go to work? You can contact me using the form or social media below.

form.title: Send a message
form.description: Fill out the form below and I'll get back to you soon!
form.name: Enter your name
form.error: We couldn't send your message. Please try again.
